title: hex_encode uses format! per byte; use faster encoding
description: api.rs:24-26 implements hex_encode as bytes.iter().map(|b| format!("{b:02x}")).collect(). This allocates a new String per byte via format!(). The function is called on every request (token hash lookup in AuthenticatedAccount extractor, plus other paths). What goes wrong: unnecessary allocation pressure under concurrent load. Replace with a write!-to-preallocated-String loop, or use the hex crate (already a transitive dep via sha2) which provides hex::encode() as a single call.
